name: Grupo de Moda SOMA S.A.
summary: Grupo de Moda SOMA S.A. manufactures and sells clothing in Brazil. The company operates stores in outlet malls, as well as operates e-commerce site. It offers clothing under brand names Animale, Farm, Osklen, New Balance, FYI, A.Brand, Mr. Cat, ATEEN, Cris Barros, Valisere, Euro, Fossil, Co. Maritime, Adidas, Marc Jacobs, Michael Kors, Technos, Jansport, and others. Grupo de Moda SOMA S.A. was founded in 2010 and is based in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil.
